    S

    setAssignee(User) - Method in class model.Issue
    Sets the assignee for this issue.
    setDescription(String) - Method in class model.Issue
    Updates the description of the issue.
    setDueDate(LocalDateTime) - Method in class model.Issue
    Sets the due date of this issue.
    setIssueStatus(Issue, BugStatus) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Updates the status of an issue.
    setLastSeenAtNow() - Method in class model.User
    Updates the user's last seen time to the current time.
    setPriority(Priority) - Method in class model.Issue
    Sets the priority of this issue.
    setStatus(BugStatus) - Method in class model.Issue
    Sets the status of this issue.
    setTitle(String) - Method in class model.Issue
    Sets the title of this issue.

    setUp() - Method in class tests.UserTest
     
    STANDARD_USER - Enum constant in enum class model.UserRole
     
    status - Variable in class model.Issue
    The current status of the issue (e.g., OPEN, CLOSED, IN_PROGRESS).
    status - Variable in record class model.IssueFullRecord
    The field for the status record component.
    status - Variable in record class model.IssueListRecord
    The field for the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class model.IssueFullRecord
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    status() - Method in record class model.IssueListRecord
    Returns the value of the status record component.
    surname - Variable in class model.User
    Surname (last name) of the user.
    surname - Variable in record class model.UserFullRecord
    The field for the surname record component.
    surname() - Method in record class model.UserFullRecord
    Returns the value of the surname record component.
